Before testing - check in at fire department reception at 1025 3rd floor. - Sign out a card/fob to access the 2nd floor to turn off AC to FACP. 

Paging and fire phone communications conducted from 1021 lobby. Conduct MBT from there.
Breaker on 2nd floor service hall mezzanine (mid corridor) in FEA panel.  Breaker #68. Access this room by taking the elevator down to 2nd Floor from 3rd Floor FD reception.

Use bypass buttons on front of annunciator for:  elevators and doors.  Left relay bypass inactivated because we are unsure yet if it controls monitoring in addition to fans. 
Panel says it has one-minute-inhibit, but signals could be silenced and reset immediately.  Be aware that this could be inhibited in the future.

If this problem returns or persists, the building should reach out to Troy, as this should still be under warranty. The LCD screen display is not something we can fix,"
